metadata_parent_invalid: Select a parent from the search field suggestions or enter Root.
settings_empty: No editable settings are available for this scope.
manage_archive_unavailable_note: Archive is unavailable for this scope until `archive` exists.
manage_clear_search_note: Clear search to manage the current doc.
manage_server_not_configured_error: Local docs-management server is not configured.
manage_unavailable_note: Manage mode unavailable: local docs server unavailable for this scope.
viewable_descendant_prompt: Choose whether to show only this doc or include its descendant docs.

docs_html_import.intro: Import staged source files into a configured docs scope.
docs_html_import.include_prompt_meta_hint: When enabled, clearly identifiable prompt/meta sections are kept as wrapped quoted prose.
docs_html_import.server_not_configured: Local docs-management server is not configured.
docs_html_import.service_unavailable: Docs management service unavailable. Start bin/dev-studio to run imports.
docs_html_import.idle_status: Select a staged source file and import it into a configured docs scope.
docs_html_import.load_files_failed: Failed to load staged import files.
docs_html_import.no_files: No supported staged import files found under var/docs/import-staging/.
docs_html_import.overwrite_required: Overwrite required: {doc_id} ({title}). Review the warning and confirm if you want to replace it.
docs_html_import.collision_body: This import matches an existing doc target. Confirm overwrite to replace the current source while keeping the same doc identity and filename.
docs_html_import.filename_conflict_body: A source file named {doc_id}.md already exists. Edit the doc_id to choose a new filename.
